title: anacamptis morio subsp. morio
intro: Anacamptis morio subsp. morio, also known as the Green-winged Orchid, is a rare, terrestrial orchid species native to Europe and parts of Western Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Anacamptis morio subsp. morio include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Anacamptis morio subsp. morio can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, as well as a tincture, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
